title: Finite Cholesky Decomposition Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Cholesky bad product-entry QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact Cholesky replay computes the bottom-right entry of L*L^T as 10 while a malformed row claims 9, isolating a compact equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional exact positive-definite factorization rows only when they add distinct product, minor, covariance, SDP, or Hessian solver pressure; keep Cholesky existence, algorithm correctness, conditioning, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational L matrix, transpose, product matrix, positive diagonal entries, and leading principal minors as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false product-entry row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting entry.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep Cholesky existence, algorithm correctness, pivoting-free applicability, floating-point conditioning, and stability claims marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
